markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the GrowthX partnership for Assort Health's marketing acceleration.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Urgent Pipeline Pressure:** Assort Health's CEO is pushing for immediate pipeline growth, creating a conflict with the new VP of Marketing's (Brooke) strategy to build a sustainable organic foundation.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**GrowthX as the Solution:** GrowthX offers a rapid-deployment team and platform to deliver foundational marketing work (audits, strategy) in an 8-week "Strategy Sprint," providing a fast-track to sustainable growth.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [**Contract Terms:** The 12-month term is non-negotiable, as it is required to fund GrowthX's VC-backed model. Weekly syncs are approved. A request for flexibility on the monthly rate is pending review.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [**CEO Buy-in Required:** Brooke needs a formal justification for her CEO, comparing GrowthX to Directive, before signing. GrowthX will provide a written summary and a customer reference.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)

## Topics

### Assort Health's Marketing Challenge

  - [Brooke, the new VP of Marketing, faces intense pressure to meet pipeline targets.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**CEO's Mandate:** 50% of Brooke's time on IC demand gen, 30% on hiring, 20% on firefighting.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Brooke's Strategy:** Build a sustainable organic foundation (SEO, site conversion) to avoid a short-term, expensive paid ad cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [**Competitive Landscape:**](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [**AI-native:** Transform9, Elise AI, Hiro](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Legacy:** Patient engagement software adding AI features](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Solution

  - [**Model:** A VC-backed tech company, not a traditional agency, with a team of 100 (60 forward-deployed) and a proprietary platform.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [**8-Week Strategy Sprint:** A rapid-deployment team delivers 6 months of work in 8 weeks, including:](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Audits & persona mapping](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [Content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [Technical fixes (via deploy engineers)](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [**Goal:** Provide quick wins and a clear roadmap, acting as an extension of the sales team.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [**Success Metric:** 80% of clients convert from the Strategy Sprint to ongoing growth execution.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)

### Contract & Logistics

  - [**Contract Term:** The 12-month term is non-negotiable.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The term is required to fund GrowthX's VC-backed model and prevent clients from using a 6-month opt-out clause to renegotiate pricing just as ROI begins to materialize.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [**Sync Cadence:** Weekly syncs are approved.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
  - [**Monthly Rate:** A request for flexibility on the monthly rate is pending review.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX (Marcel):**](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Connect Brooke with Megan (VP Marketing, Tavern) for a customer reference.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
      - [Review the monthly rate flexibility request and provide an answer.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**GrowthX (Tyler):**](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
      - [Draft a formal justification for Brooke's CEO, comparing GrowthX to Directive and explaining the value proposition.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [**Assort Health (Brooke):**](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
      - [Use the provided materials to secure CEO buy-in for the partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/ioeTCarBychTjsFMMNyzTyeCeHqBaQwA?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
